title: Filter notifications by Workspace
excerpt: As someone who separates both clients and departments into Workspaces, I would love to be able to sort my notifications by Workspace the notification came from like how we’re able to sort by which person sent the notific…

posts.author: micaylabrewster (Micayla Brewster)
posts.cookedHtml: As someone who separates both clients and departments into Workspaces, I would love to be able to sort my notifications by Workspace the notification came from like how we’re able to sort by which person sent the notification.

posts.author: micaylabrewster (Micayla Brewster)
posts.cookedHtml: ** I would love to be able to sort or filter my notifications by Workspace on the notification tab, like to how we’re able to sort by which person sent the notification.
